title: ononis natrix f. pinguis
intro: Ononis natrix f. pinguis, also known as the Narrow-leaved Restharrow, is a flowering plant species within the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, alleviating urinary tract issues, and acting as an antiseptic. Narrow-leaved Restharrow can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies for various ailments.
